title: Fit test - 2nd screen UI
scenario: Fit Test 2nd screen UI displays correctly when starting test from Device Settings on Voyager Free 60/60+ or Voyager Free 20
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Ensure a supported device (Voyager Free 60/60+ or Voyager Free 20) is connected via Bluetooth.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. Scroll down and tap on 'Fit Test'.
5. On the Fit Test screen, tap the 'Start Test' button.
6. Observe the UI displayed on the 2nd screen after tapping 'Start Test'.
expected: The 2nd screen UI after tapping 'Start Test' matches the Figma design specifications, including correct layout, text, icons, and interactive elements.
